title: Build a tiny cobblestone house
goal: Build a tiny house out of cobblestone near where you spawned. First make a wooden pickaxe, then mine ENOUGH cobblestone before you start building — a small house needs roughly 30 blocks, so mine about 30 cobblestone first so you do not run out partway. THEN build: a finished tiny house must fully ENCLOSE a space at least 3x3 on the ground, with walls at least 2 blocks tall on every side AND a roof covering the top (leaving a 1-block doorway is fine). A few blocks on the ground is NOT a house. Only call stop() once the walls AND the roof are actually complete.
rationale: Open-ended building task with a tool dependency (human-reviewed). The bot must climb the early tool tier (wood -> pickaxe), mine cobblestone, then place many blocks into a coherent small structure and decide for itself when it is done. Tests tool-tier reasoning, long-horizon planning, and spatial placement.
review_note: Human-reviewed: judge whether the placed blocks form a small, mostly-enclosed cobblestone house (walls + a roof). The scorecard's build summary lists what was placed.
